content.problemStatement:
Two drunken players Alice and Bob are playing a modified version of Tic-Tac-Toe.

Initially, there is a Nأ—MN \times MNأ—M empty grid.

Alice and Bob take alternate turns **starting with Alice**. In her turn, Alice chooses an empty cell on the board and puts a `"A"` on the chosen cell. In Bob's turn, he chooses an empty cell and puts a `"B"` on the chosen cell.

The player who first gets any Kأ—KK\times KKأ—K subgrid completely filled with his/her initial wins the game. By a Kأ—KK\times KKأ—K subgrid, we mean the intersection of KKK consecutive rows and KKK consecutive columns. The players do not stop making turns after one of them wins and they play all Nâ‹…MN \cdot MNâ‹…M turns until the grid is filled.

You are given the sequence of moves played by each player (The cell selected by the player in his/her turn). You have to output the winner of the game or report that there is no winner.
constraints: The sum of Nâ‹…MN\cdot MNâ‹…M over all test cases does not exceed 10610^6106.
`ExplanationAfter 101010 turns of the game the state of the grid is:
`At this moment, Bob has achieved a subgrid of 2أ—22 \times 22أ—2 with his initials while Alice has not achieved it yet so Bob is the winner.
content.inputFormat:
The first line contains an integer TTT, the number of test cases. Then the test cases follow.
The first line of each test case contains three integers NNN, MMM, KKK.
Each of the next Nâ‹…MN\cdot MNâ‹…M lines contains two integers XXX, YYY (the row and column of the cell chosen by the player with the current turn)
content.outputFormat: For each test case, output `"Alice"` if Alice wins the game or `"Bob"` if Bob wins the game or `"Draw"` if no one wins.
